ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Name of the state capital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the county belongs to */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "county_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county (population per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease (e.g., Pediatric Asthma, COPD) */,
  "disease_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the disease */,
  "disease_symptoms" TEXT /* Common symptoms of the disease */,
  "disease_risk_factors" TEXT /* Known risk factors for the disease */,
  "disease_treatment_options" TEXT /* Common treatment options for the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the statistic belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the statistic belongs to */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the statistic is for */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistics are for */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state or county */,
  "disease_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases of the disease in the state or county */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of cases by gender (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of cases by age groups (e.g., 0-5, 6-17, 18-65, 65+) */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of cases by ethnicity */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_statistics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_statistics_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_statistics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prevalence_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the rate belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the rate belongs to */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the rate is for */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the prevalence rate is for */,
  "prevalence_rate" REAL /* Prevalence rate of the disease in the state or county */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of rates by gender (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of rates by age groups (e.g., 0-5, 6-17, 18-65, 65+) */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of rates by ethnicity */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for the prevalence rates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalence_rates_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalence_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalence_rates_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalence_rates_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the trend belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the trend belongs to */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the trend is for */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the trend is for */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases of the disease in the state or county for the given year */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of cases by gender (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of cases by age groups (e.g., 0-5, 6-17, 18-65, 65+) */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of cases by ethnicity */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for the trends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, health professional) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., survey, department) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the import is from */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of import (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "import_description" TEXT /* Description of the data import */,
  "import_file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file imported */,
  "import_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the imported file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation */,
  "import_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data import the validation is for */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the validation process */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("import_id") REFERENCES data_imports ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic the metric is for */,
  "data_quality_metric" TEXT /* Name of the data quality metric (e.g., completeness, accuracy) */,
  "data_quality_value" REAL /* Value of the data quality metric */,
  "quality_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality metric */,
  "quality_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the data quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES disease_statistics ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_file_name" TEXT /* Name of the report file */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., table, chart, map) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_file_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization file */,
  "visualization_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the visualization file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
